notes: 100% coverage means every CUDA backend-independent capability is classified. Portable WebGPU is not required to natively implement non-portable features.

ops.notes: Vulkan/WGPU clone materializes strided via copy_strided_src; contiguous uses buffer copy. f8e4m3 is CUDA-only in this baseline (no Vulkan/WebGPU arithmetic/storage path).
ops.portable_notes: Portable capability within standard WebGPU/WGSL limits.

ops.notes: D2H download path; used by host readback and quantized CPU fallbacks. f8e4m3 is CUDA-only in this baseline (no Vulkan/WebGPU arithmetic/storage path).

ops.notes: CUDA rejects i16/i32 destinations. Core 36-pair {f32,f16,bf16,u8,u32,i64} closed on both GPUs; F64 via SPIR-V double / WGSL lo-hi words. No f8e4m3 on Vulkan/WGPU. f8e4m3 is CUDA-only in this baseline (no Vulkan/WebGPU arithmetic/storage path).
ops.portable_notes: Portable capability within standard WebGPU/WGSL limits. Portable profile classified Native (not Verified): no browser/WASM suite evidence in this pass; do not treat native wgpu smokes as portable Verified.

ops.notes: Vulkan/WGPU core is f32; f16/bf16 via f32 materialize; integers/f64/f8 not native on GPU backends. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3', 'i16', 'i32', 'i64', 'u32', 'u8'].
ops.portable_notes: Same GPU composition path is portable WGSL-compatible.

ops.notes: Vulkan powf_f32 SPIR-V; BF16 via f32 decomp; F16 Vulkan may fail without decomp path for pure powf (F32/BF16 certified). CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3'].
ops.portable_notes: Same GPU composition path is portable WGSL-compatible.

ops.notes: alpha!=1.0 uses composition or custom unary on GPU backends. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3'].
ops.portable_notes: Same GPU composition path is portable WGSL-compatible.

ops.notes: Sum/Min/Max/ArgMin/ArgMax. Half types materialize to f32 first on Vulkan/WGPU. F64/f8e4m3 CUDA-only. Empty tensor errors for min/max/arg*. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3', 'i16'].
ops.portable_notes: Same GPU composition path is portable WGSL-compatible.

ops.notes: CUDA uses BackendStorage default (not implemented). Not required for CUDA-parity surface; Vulkan/WGPU ahead with GPU path.

ops.portable_notes: Portable capability within standard WebGPU/WGSL limits. Portable profile classified Native (not Verified): no browser/WASM suite evidence in this pass; do not treat native wgpu smokes as portable Verified.

ops.notes: Outputs u8 mask. Rank5 F32/BF16 certified via compact materialization. F64/f8 CUDA-only. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3'].
ops.portable_notes: Portable capability within standard WebGPU/WGSL limits.

ops.notes: Ops: exp,log,sin,cos,abs,neg,recip,sqr,sqrt,gelu,gelu_erf,erf,relu,silu,tanh,floor,ceil,round,sign (+ucopy). Integers mainly copy/neg on CUDA. GPU backends focus f32/f16 with BF16/F64 via f32. Rank>4 via compact materialize. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f8e4m3', 'i64', 'u32', 'u8'].
ops.portable_notes: Portable WGSL has no f64; lo/hi word GPU emulation.

ops.notes: Add/Sub/Mul/Div/Maximum/Minimum. Core dtypes closed; F64 via f32 decomp on GPU; f8e4m3 CUDA-only; rank5 broadcast add certified. f8e4m3 is CUDA-only in this baseline (no Vulkan/WebGPU arithmetic/storage path).
ops.portable_notes: Portable WGSL has no f64; lo/hi word GPU emulation.

ops.notes: Condition typically u8. BF16 via f32 select->bf16. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3'].
ops.portable_notes: Portable capability within standard WebGPU/WGSL limits.

ops.notes: CUDA im2col+matmul (or cudnn). Integers u32/i* unsupported on CUDA. Vulkan/WGPU f32 path + half via f32. CUDA-only dtypes vs GPU backends: ['f64', 'f8e4m3', 'u8'].
ops.portable_notes: Same GPU composition path is portable WGSL-compatible.

ops.notes: FP8 (f8e4m3) arithmetic is present on CUDA baseline. Standard Vulkan 1.3 and WebGPU/WGSL do not provide portable FP8 ALU; no Candle capability query exposes FP8 compute on these backends. GPUEmulated unpack-to-f16/f32 is possible future work and must not be reported as Native.
ops.portable_notes: WGSL has no f8e4m3; UnsupportedBySpecification for portable profile.
